title: v1.3 full report and wrong-question one-to-one repair

notes: Hero, report-content rows, wrong-question cards, disclaimer, and bottom share/PDF actions were rebuilt toward the _3 v1.3 reference.
Wrong-question card navigation remains data-backed through questionId and orderId.
The old T38 full-report-entry state remains a separate page; v1.3 full-report uses V13-UI-FULL-REPORT and the /pages/full-report/index state.
Top bar, tag row, original question, student answer frame, answer/knowledge grid, diagnosis block, explanation mascot, AI CTA, history row, and bottom navigation were rebuilt toward the _1 reference.
AI tutor entry preserves orderId and questionId context and remains locked for basic users.
Share and PDF controls keep local placeholder/export behavior.

verification.reason: scripts/run-tests.mjs currently requires every requested selector to belong to one test group, so the exact combined command matches no group.

verification.evidence: 2 v1.3 screen comparisons written by the local structural visual harness.

limitations: The exact combined npm test command is blocked by existing selector semantics; equivalent individual groups pass.
Visual verification is structural/manual-review evidence. No pixel-perfect PASS is claimed.
